sections.title: Abstract
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Write a structured abstract with Background, Methods, Results, and Conclusions subsections.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Introduce the clinical problem, summarize key literature gaps, and state the study hypothesis or objective.

sections.title: Methods
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Describe study design, patient selection, interventions, endpoints, and statistical methods.

sections.title: Results
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Present findings in logical order: patient characteristics, primary endpoint, secondary endpoints, adverse events.

sections.title: Discussion
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Interpret results in context of existing literature. Address limitations. State clinical implications.

sections.title: References
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Compile cited literature using Vancouver numbered citation style.
